name: Mirewood Manor: Multiplayer Haunted House Horror

reviews.review_description: I haven't been playing long (just found the treehouse) but I'm loving it! The retro-style graphics make me feel like I'm walking around in a PS2 game, which I love! I wish there was some music playing more often, but I can supply my own spooky music. I'm excited to get back in and help the spirits of the Manor.

I was loving this game until I got to the laser room. Impossible to get through. You jump and you’re clearly well above the laser and still dont make it. Ive tried at least over 50 times. Played 60% of the game an d now I won’t go back to it. What a shame!!

I m getting to like game but very hard to pick up stuff. Also carrieng stuff you can't  go in another room with item. Also the keyboard is not facing you so you can use it . I tried 3 times going out back in but can't  implement the keyboard to fac me. Even when it faces the other direction can't input my name ect. My wife and I bought the bundle and in mirewood manor it's very sketchy very confusing how to get things done thanks

developer_response.body: Thanks for purchasing Mirewood Manor, Hammerman! We're glad you are beginning to like the game! Please note that any item you can pick up in a room is meant to be used specifically in that room, so there is no need to go to another room with it. Please also note that there is a hint button in the Main Room just incase you get stuck.

reviews.review_description: I just bought this game , I 'm Brazilian and the game is only in English , I can not play , I would like a refund please

EDIT: It has been over a year and a half since my first review and the devs clearly do not care about improving the game. They want to charge a full game price but don't consider player feedback. The overwhelming majority of players have a huge issue with the platforming sections and nothing has been done. Moreover, if it is clear the devs don't care enough to fix issues that have been present since the beginning of the development, what makes you think they will update and keep the game relevant? Do better, listen to valuable feedback from active users, and for the love of God ... change the awful jumping mechanisms (they are trash).

Since my brother and I have started playing this game we have had a blast (mostly). The puzzles are always enjoyable and exciting, challenges are mostly fun (read below), spooky jump scares combined with the eerie soundtrack and captivating story make this game so much more enjoyable. Additionally, exploring the mansion is awesome + you get collectables for doing so! No matter if you are playing alone or with someone, you will enjoy this unique experience. 

This being said the game could use some improvements. As others have noted in the reviews, the platforming sections can be very frustrating to say the least. The jumping mechanism is far from perfect which makes the jumping challenges aggravating. For example: The section with the emblematic was extremely challenging for two reasons. One, just jumping on to the platforms is hard but then moving around as the platforms move is almost impossible. The only way I and other have been able to jump on her head to start the challenge was by using the fireplace and one platform to reach the head, but not as intended. Second, after you reach the head with the apples, no matter how physically hard I would throw the apple, the throw would not reach the target or react as it should. I thought I would be stuck here forever but luckily I made the shot after 60 tries.
Another almost impossible section is the secret lab with lasers which I am now completely stuck in. I have tried over and over for the last couple of weeks but this section got the best of me. I read the develpers tips and watched walk-through videos but CANNOT pass without hitting a laser. My brother and I have stopped playing ever since. I respect all that the developers do and the great game they created but the platform sections are more frustrating than fun and takes away from the outstanding game experience. This is just my opinion but having seen multiple people complaining over the same issue and hearing it from people that have played, I consider this an issue that can be improved in the future (hopefully soon). Or at least have a skip button that can be paid with sc currency.

reviews.review_title: Love the gameplay, hate the physics
reviews.review_description:
This is absolutely crazy that this game is: fun, creepy, exploratory, has a good story and is FREE. I have been obsessed with this game playing it daily for a week. Love the story and the exploration.

But, I think the physics of the game could be improved. There are challenges that you  must jump and/or throw things, which have been very irritating to me. I had a very difficult time with the emblematic level, the gymnasium, and now am stuck in the secret lab. It's pretty hard to tell whether or not you actually hit the Lazer, and I wish the jumping and running mechanism would be improved to help on these levels.

Giving 5 stars because I love the game and story,and hoping that the devs will improve the physics, or maybe offer an option to skip the jumping and throwing.
Levels are basically unplayable and everything is an add on. Not recommend.

reviews.review_title: Was fun till I found jumping didn't work
reviews.review_description: Fun game until I got stuck for hrs and have found no walk thru or info on how to jump on the moving platforms I tried everything fireplace etc I've double jumped with no success . Guess I've gone as far as I can go in this game, tried everything did find one video but I couldn't duplicate their jump after another hr of trying I'm still close but not getting any closer to the top I give up . A wee bit too difficult need a skip to just move past this objective

I thought I'd try some applab things to get into the VR world. On this one - i can not "point" the controller(s) to do anything. it just hung in a room, prompting me to create private room, etc. I could not make any selection.
(Update)… I certainly pushed every button on both controllers. When I get the chance I’ll redo it, but I am pretty confident I pushed the triggers and finger controls.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing Mirewood Manor! To make a selection, you need to first press the grip button on either controller and this will activate your pointer. Please also try out the tutorial, as this will explain all the in-game mechanics. Thanks again!

reviews.review_title: Hard work has clearly gone into this
reviews.review_description:
First impressions review here: https://youtu.be/93_PvcGpE5U

An interesting Haunted House game with a long story mode (although I failed to get very far) as well as several other different modes that I experiment with in this video! There are some things that need ironing out, but it's 100% clear that the developers have put a lot of hard work into making the game and I think it deserves your attention!
Good

Edit:  thanks to the Devs we understood what was happening and were able to carry on and make great progress tonight. Each pass we get a little smarter, and can move on. Much appreciated the encouragement!!

"If you can get through the lasers you can get through anything". Um, not so much. We have been stuck at chapter 18 with absolutely no more ideas of how to proceed. Chapter 17 ended before we found all three of the birthday clues. We were at 79% but today we are at 77%. We have been in the doll house but can't get there now. We are in the attic now but keep getting booted back to the main room when we pick up the yellow key (the hint says "key" but there are actually 4 keys. It's been awesome up to now. We won't finish it unless there's some dev input. Our other team is stuck in the lasers...  they're less and less happy as the days go on.... appreciate the work that must go into this. Hoping to hear from someone so we can determine if we've got a glitch happening - we've never been booted to the main room like this before... thank you.

developer_response.body: Hello Barbara, thank you for playing Mirewood Manor! When you pick up the yellow key in the attic, it sets off a trap that shoots an arrow at whoever picks it up. All you have to do is quickly move out of the way when when the key is clicked (try going down the ramp you came up). After passing that, you will see a pink key, click that and this will display the dollhouse in the back corner of the attic. Be prepared for even more traps in the dollhouse! We hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: It’s so good but I got 74 percent done with the story but I had to reset my quest and I gotta start over now 😒

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing Mirewood Manor, Parker! We use a cloud saving feature, so I believe even if you have to factory reset your Quest, your data should remain intact when you reinstall it under the same account.

reviews.review_description: Poop

developer_response.body: If you have any feedback, please elaborate. Your feedback is vital to improving Mirewood Manor.

reviews.review_description: This game is great for many things, first the story mode is filled with challenges and jumpscares that had me wanting to take my headset off lol then you got all the different game modes you can play. I can honestly say I will be playing this game for quite some time! Would recommend this game to everyone!

developer_response.body: Hey Midnight! Glad we could get the key issue sorted out, and extra glad you're enjoying the game. Thanks for the review, we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game & you can't beat the price. Love the fact that there are so many things to do. I love that there is a hint button, but wish there was an extra hint if the 1st one doesn't help. Love the jumpscares. There are just enough to keep you on edge. Can't wait to try it with some friends. Thank you for creating such a cool puzzle game that can be played with friends and one that has hours of game play.

The game is very confusing. I couldn't get into the 2nd room even though it should have been the correct room according to the map. We spent nearly an hour trying to figure things out, but gave up because it kept telling me that I was wrong and to try again.  Very frustrating.

developer_response.body: Thanks for purchasing the game, Connie! Which 2nd room are you referring to? Also, please note there is a hint system just incase you get stuck.

reviews.review_description: I'm always partial to anything people create in which they put their whole heart into it. I can tell that this game was created with idea of making just a fun experience for both the developers who worked on it and for the players who will get to enjoy it. I'd say the game is a success and I look forward to more creations from the group. Keep it up, I expect great things!

developer_response.body: Thanks Dyzzy! We hope to continue updating the game for a long time to come with new missions and avatars.

reviews.review_description: I was having a lot of fun. There's no way this game is free! Than I ran into the apple toss. Like many good puzzle games, they HAD to throw in a quick time jump platform physical test. I am not physically capable of throwing the apple far enough, I'm just not. It's bullsh** to tease me with a great game than just wall me like that. It's uneeded and doesn't flow with the game at all.

Really enjoyed this game and even more because it was one I could play with my best friend. Endless scares and laughs and just a really great time! Absolutely recommend this if you like haunted stuff and escape type rooms. The only downside is I want more when its over!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for this review! We're glad you enjoyed the game! As to wanting more, we are currently working on something called "Beyond the Manor," which will be DLC that takes you to various places around the world. One of the first DLCs will take you to an Abandoned Hospital. We hope to release the first set by the beginning of September!
